heading: Fancy a Coffee or a Gift?
intro: If you enjoyed my work or found my projects helpful, you can support me with a virtual coffee, a small gift, or simply by sending some love! Every gesture, big or small, inspires me to keep building and sharing. Thank you for your kindness!
footerText: Your support keeps me energized and motivated. Thank you so much!

coffee.title: Buy Me a Coffee
coffee.description: Fuel my creativity and late-night coding with a virtual coffee! Your gesture keeps my passion alive.

gift.title: Send a Gift
gift.description: Show your appreciation by sending a small gift. Every bit of support motivates me to create more awesome projects.

love.title: Spread Some Love
love.description: Share a little love if my work helped you. Your support means the world and keeps me going!
